observation.summary: runtime-upgrade-flow.md described no-silent-upgrade behavior as prose while implemented and reserved evidence were mixed together.

hypothesis.summary: A manifest can generate the reader doc and separate implemented runtime pin evidence from reserved active-drift cancellation evidence.

execution.summary: Run runtimeupgrade to check generated docs, source evidence, and reserved evidence requirements.

evaluation.summary: The verifier rejects generated doc drift, source drift, unknown references, implemented rows without source checks, and reserved rows pretending to be implemented.

retrospective.summary: Runtime upgrade knowledge now exposes the exact remaining evidence gaps instead of hiding them in narrative prose.

evidence.proves: runtime upgrade manifest matches generated reader docs and local source evidence
public CI uploads runtime upgrade flow evidence
